name: dregg-front-door-extension
description: MV3 browser-extension front door built on @dregg/sdk/browser — dregg identity + an authorized, human-confirmed .turn() from any page; the key never leaves the extension.
comment: @dregg/sdk is consumed from the sibling sdk-ts SOURCE via the build alias (build.mjs), not installed — this is the front-door slice built ON sdk-ts. @noble/* resolve from sdk-ts/node_modules (the parent), which esbuild walks up to.
